name: Potato Spice Cake
recipeIngredient: 1/4 teaspoon Each cloves, nutmeg, cinnamon, and allspice
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, sugar, cocoa powder, baking powder, salt, and spices.
2. Cut shortening into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse cornmeal.
3. Stir in milk, mashed potatoes, beaten eggs, and flavorings (vanilla and lemon extracts) until smooth.
4. Mix in nuts and raisins.
5. Pour batter into a large well-greased angel cake pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 70 minutes or until done.
7. Cool about 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
